title: Great Lakes water levels and related data - Canada.ca
content:
## Great Lakes water levels and related data
Information on Great Lakes water levels is available from several agencies in the United States and Canada. This Web page contains links to a number of official Web sites containing Great Lakes water level and related data.

## Government of Canada newsletters
- LEVELnews and latest Great Lakes water level and basin information

## Current and recent water level data
- Daily water levels for the current month
- Monthly and daily water levels
- Water levels at United States gauges
- Hourly water levels at Canadian gauges
- Weekly water level bulletin
- Telephone numbers for present levels at Canadian gauges

## Water level forecasts
- Canadian monthly water level bulletin - Great Lakes and Montréal Harbour
- United States monthly water level bulletin - Great Lakes
- United States weekly water level forecast

## Historical water levels
- Historical monthly mean water levels

## Flows in connecting channels
- Lake Superior and Lake Ontario outflows
- Daily precipitation by Great Lake basin
- Marine weather for Lake Superior
- Marine weather for Lake Huron
- Marine weather for Lake Erie and Lake Ontario
- Text bulletin wave height forecasts for the Great Lakes and St. Lawrence River
- Recent data at wave buoys and wind data at shore stations
- Government of Canada - Canadian ice service
- United States National Ice Center
- Great Lakes statistics (surface water temperature and ice concentration)
- Recent data at wave buoys

## Other links of interest
- Coordinating committee on Great Lakes basic hydraulic and hydrologic data
- Quarterly Climate Impacts and Outlook
- International Joint Commission
- International Lake Superior Board of Control
- International Lake Ontario - St. Lawrence River Board
- International Niagara Board of Control
- International Upper Great Lakes Study Board

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
